name: private dashboard set stores multiline content
description: 验证已绑定用户可以在私聊里直接设置个人看板，且会返回行数与非空格字符统计。

args.text:
看板 第一行
第二行 @提醒

INSERT INTO bot_account_bindings (id, bot_platform, bot_user_id, game_platform, player_id, account_key, display_name, is_active, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (9911, 'qq', '20001', '2048verse', 9101, 'dashboard_user', 'dashboard_user', 1, '{}', '2026-06-04 09:00:00', '2026-06-04 09:00:00');

expected.reply:
个人看板已更新。
行数：2/10
非空格字符：9/200
群里可发送“@bot 你的用户名”查看。

name: group dashboard query shows sanitized content
description: 验证群里任何人都可以通过 @bot 用户名 查看已绑定用户设置的个人看板，并且会转义 @ 提及。

seed_sql: INSERT INTO players (id, display_name, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (9102, 'DashboardUser', 'active', '2026-06-04 09:00:00', '2026-06-04 09:00:00');

INSERT INTO bot_account_bindings (id, bot_platform, bot_user_id, game_platform, player_id, account_key, display_name, is_active, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (9912, 'qq', '20002', '2048verse', 9102, 'dashboard_user', 'dashboard_user', 1, '{}', '2026-06-04 09:00:00', '2026-06-04 09:00:00');

INSERT INTO bot_player_dashboards (id, game_platform, player_id, dashboard_text, line_count, nonspace_char_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (9921, '2048verse', 9102, replace('第一行\\n第二行 @提醒', '\\n', char(10)), 2, 9, '2026-06-04 09:00:00', '2026-06-04 09:00:00');

expected.reply:
玩家: dashboard_user
个人看板
第一行
第二行 ＠提醒
